title: Canada — Immigration News & Alerts — ELLIS PORTER
content:
The Department of Homeland Security has confirmed that the restrictions on nonessential land border travel between the US, Canada and Mexico have been extended to September 21, 2020.
The restriction on non-essential travel between the US, Canada and Mexico has been extended indefinitely.
The Department of Homeland Security has announced that existing travel restrictions in place with Canada and Mexico have been extended for an additional 30 days, until May 21.
